title: AN ACT TO AMEND PROJECT NUMBERED (128), PAGE 24-A, TITLE A, APPENDIX A OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED  NINETEEN  HUNDRED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4107 / 58 OG No. 14, 2893 (April 2, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3286, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND PROJECT NUMBERED (128), PAGE 24-A, TITLE A, APPENDIX A OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Project No. (128), page 24-A, Title A, Appendix A of Republic Act Numbered Nineteen hundred, is amended to read as follows:

"(128): Bibak Students: GOB:80.00: (80.00): (80.00) :..: .. : .. : .. : .. :1: .. : .. : Construction."

Dormitory :

including:

purchase of :

equipment :

Baguio City :

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
